risk_title: Political Transition Delaying National WASH Fund Establishment
risk_summary: The push to pass the water bill through the National Assembly before the May 2023 political transition failed, delaying establishment of the National WASH Fund and impacting DLI 1 disbursements. The bill must now be re-presented to the new National Assembly.
evidence_quote: The push to get the water bill passed by the National Assembly (NASS) before the political transition which happened in May 2023 did not materialize. This may result in a delay in establishing the National WASH fund as it is part of the proposed water bill. The Ministry plans to review and present again to the new National Assembly the bill after holding stakeholder consultative fora across the country.

risk_title: Political Instability Rated as High Risk
risk_summary: Political and Governance risk category is rated as 'High' in the current assessment, up from 'Substantial' at approval, indicating worsening political instability affecting program implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating]: Previous Rating High, Current Rating High
